vocab.example: There is a bustling construction site a stone's throw away from my apartment, so the thudding of machinery is constant.

vocab.word: at the top of their lungs
vocab.meaning: hết sức bình sinh (gào thét, hát hò)
vocab.example: I often hear teenagers in the park across the street singing at the top of their lungs late into the night.

vocab.meaning: phá tan bầu không khí tĩnh lặng (âm thanh sắc bén)
vocab.example: The shrill sound of the morning siren always cuts through the silence of the dawn, signaling the start of the workday.

vocab.meaning: làm tôi phát điên hoặc cực kỳ khó chịu
vocab.example: The incessant dripping of a faulty faucet in my kitchen is enough to drive me around the bend.

vocab.meaning: âm thanh cực kỳ lớn (như muốn nổ tung trần nhà)
vocab.example: When the heavy metal band starts practicing in the garage nearby, the volume truly hits the roof.

vocab.meaning: suốt ngày đêm, không ngừng nghỉ
vocab.example: The hum of the industrial air conditioning units runs night and day, becoming a permanent backdrop to my life.

vocab.meaning: tĩnh lặng như tờ (thường dùng để so sánh tương phản)
vocab.example: My neighborhood is usually as quiet as the grave, making the sudden roar of a motorbike even more jarring.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại âm hưởng/cảm xúc (thường dùng cho tiếng nhạc hoặc âm thanh quen thuộc)
vocab.example: The melodic chimes of the neighborhood church strike a chord with me every Sunday morning.

vocab.meaning: vượt ngưỡng, cực kỳ cao (nói về mức độ ồn ào)
vocab.example: During the festival season, the decibel levels from the street parades are absolutely off the charts.
Living within earshot of the primary school, I'm treated to the energetic clamor of children during their recess.
